name: Fantasy Modern World
description:
A fantasy modern world, grand strategy game, tested with Deepseek v3.1 Terminus.

Current update: Rosas Legacy

Current nations with content:

-Platinia (Argentina)

-Terusalem (Perú)

-Zapostan (Ukraine)

Coming soon:

-Kirov (Russia) content instead of being just a enemy and a obstacle to a Zapostan playthrough.

-Autropean bloc detailed countries with one country with content and Autropean mechanics.

-Mercosur Bloc mechanics

-Venezilia (Venezuela) content.

You have an assistant that is called Nikki, she is Nikki:

She would help you in your journey being president of the nation you choose.

Choose a real country and the IA would create the fantasy counterpart of the country or play with the countries with content, give your country into great power status, outmaneuver the initial challenge of content nations or try daring moves resurrecting dissolved empires, your decision, choose your political party, boost your economy or army, get hegemonity or die trying.
creator: Pez12
